gear.name: Medkit
gear.description: Remove 1 Stun marker from an adjacent trooper as a Combat Action.

gear.name: Motion Scanner
gear.description: Increase Contact detection range by 2" for this trooper.

gear.name: Evac Beacon
gear.description: All troopers carry beacons for extraction. Used to request Evac from Round 5 onwards.

gear.name: Demolition Charge
gear.description: Place on any terrain feature. At the end of the round, the feature is destroyed. Area 3", Damage 2.

gear.name: Signal Flare
gear.description: All Contact markers within 6" are immediately checked for Detection.
